zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Poyntz於1467年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾易隆 阿克頓時，她的父親Sir Humphrey Poyntz37歲，母親Elizabeth Pollard33歲。她於大約1482年與Fulke Prideaux在英國戴文素可姆結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1535年在英國戴文霍爾頓享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Poyntz于1467年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾易隆 阿克頓时，她的父亲Sir Humphrey Poyntz37岁，母亲Elizabeth Pollard33岁。她于大约1482年与Fulke Prideaux在英国戴文素可姆结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1535年在英国戴文霍爾頓享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Poyntz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Points
meanings: from the Old French personal name Ponz, Ponce, from Latin Pontius (see Ponce ).

habitational name from any of several places called Ponts (such as those in Manche and in Seine-Maritime, Normandy), from Latin pontes ‘bridges’. This name has been established since the 13th century in Ireland, where it appears as Pounce and Pounche, and is Gaelicized as Púinse.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Christopher
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Poyntz was born in 1467, in Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, England, her father, Sir Humphrey Poyntz, was 37 and her mother, Elizabeth Pollard, was 33. She married Fulke Prideaux about 1482, in Sutcombe, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1535, in Holbeton, Devon, England, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Poyntz est née en 1467, à Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Humphrey Poyntz, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Pollard, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Fulke Prideaux environ 1482, à Sutcombe, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1535, à Holbeton, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine Poyntz 1467 in Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Humphrey Poyntz 37 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Pollard 33. it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Poyntz è nata il nel 1467 nel Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, England, sua padre, Sir Humphrey Poyntz, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Pollard, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Fulke Prideaux circa 1482, nel Sutcombe, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1535, nel Holbeton, Devon, England, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Poyntzが1467年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアイロン アクトンで生まれた時，父Sir Humphrey Poyntzは37歳，母Elizabeth Pollardは33歳であった。約1482年にイギリスデボンストコンベでFulke Prideauxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1535年にイギリスデボンホールベトンで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Poyntz(이)가 1467년 영국 그루스스터실르 이런 악턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Humphrey Poyntz(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Pollard(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 대략 1482년 영국 데폰 수트코브에서 Fulke Prideaux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1535년 영국 데폰 홀베턴에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Poyntz nasceu em 1467, em Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Humphrey Poyntz, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Pollard, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Fulke Prideaux aproximadamente 1482, em Sutcombe, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1535, em Holbeton, Devon, Inglaterra, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Poyntz родилась в 1467 г. в местности ирон актон, глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Humphrey Poyntz было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Pollard, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Fulke Prideaux около 1482 г. в местности суткомб, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1535 г. в местности холбетон, девон, Англия в возрасте 68 лет.

Se casó con Fulke Prideaux aproximadamente 1482, en Sutcombe, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1535, en Holbeton, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 68 años.
